testcase.name: test_production_create_and_delete
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_5_8.py:120: in test_production_create_and_delete assert cr.status_code == 200, cr.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"literal_error","loc":["body","shift"],"msg":"Input should be 'morning', 'afternoon', 'evening' or 'night'","input":"sang","ctx":{"expected":"'morning', 'afternoon', 'evening' or 'night'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/literal_error"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_production_create_invalid_product
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_5_8.py:149: in test_production_create_invalid_product assert r.status_code == 404 E assert 422 == 404 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
